issues.description: Effect structure is fundamentally wrong. '[DON!! x2]' is a cost, not a trigger condition. The card text describes a permanent ability ('can also attack'), not an activated ability with Unblockable duration.
'Activated' trigger is incorrect. This is a passive/permanent ability, not player-activated. Should use 'Trigger' with 'Always' condition.
'GiveKeyword' with 'Unblockable' and 'EndOfTurn' duration is wrong. The ability is permanent, not temporary. The effect should use 'GiveKeyword' with duration 'Permanent'.
'PlaySelf' action is spurious. The card text contains no instruction to play this card; it only grants an ability.
